QW-202  TYPE OF TESTS REQUIRED FOR PROCEDURE QUALIFICATION. (a) The types of tests required for qualification shall be as required by QW-160. (b) Each WPS shall be supported by PQRs that document actual welding conditions and test results. (c) The PQR shall record all essential variables in accordance with QW-250. Test specimens shall meet the requirements of QW-150, subject to the thickness limits of QW-451. See also QW-200 for WPS content. For performance qualification, refer to QW-301, unless exempted by QW-190 for alternative examinations.
